# susalabs.com llms.txt

> SusaLabs is a global custom software development company powered by AI, delivering end-to-end product engineering, AI automation, CRM systems, and cloud solutions for startups, SMEs, and enterprises across healthcare, finance, education, telecom, energy, and retail.

SusaLabs is headquartered at 625 Union Hill Rd, Alpharetta, GA 30004, USA, with development teams in India and the USA. The company is co-founded by Gautam Gianchandi (CEO, 33+ years experience) and Sunil Mudgal (CTO, 15+ years experience). SusaLabs partners with government bodies, defence organizations, and global corporations including the Indian Army, Google, TRAI, Nepal Telecom, and the US Congress Library.

## Core Services

- Custom Software Development: Bespoke software for startups, SMEs, and enterprises; full-stack web and mobile applications; legacy system modernization using cloud-native microservices and Kubernetes
- AI & Machine Learning: AI-powered diagnostics, automation, and intelligent workflow systems; deep learning and NLP integrations
- CRM Development: Custom CRM tools for patient and client management, especially in healthcare
- Healthcare Software: HIPAA-compliant medical software, AI-driven diagnostics, digital health records, custom medical software development
- Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Azure, GCP deployments; Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD pipelines
- Blockchain Development: Smart contracts with Solidity, Ethereum, and Hyperledger; tamper-proof claim records
- IoT Solutions: Industry 4.0, predictive maintenance, smart factory automation
- Digital Marketing: SEO, SMO, content marketing, PPC campaign management

## Industry Solutions

- Automobile Insurance: AI-powered risk assessment and fraud reduction
- Claim Settlement: Automated platform reducing processing time by 70%; blockchain-backed records
- Banking: Open API core banking with real-time transactions and fintech integrations
- Industrial / Manufacturing: IoT-enabled predictive maintenance and smart factory automation
- Education ERP: Administration, virtual learning, and student analytics platforms
- Health Insurance: Automated claim verification and pre-authorization; up to 40% reduction in processing costs

## Technology Stack

Languages: Java, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, C++, C#, Go, Rust, Kotlin, Swift, PHP, Ruby, HTML, CSS
Frontend: React, Angular, Vue.js, Svelte, Next.js, Nuxt.js, Tailwind, Bootstrap
Backend: Node.js, Express, Django, Flask, Spring, Laravel, Ruby on Rails, ASP.NET
Databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Oracle, SQL Server, Firebase, DynamoDB
Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Azure, GCP, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Ansible, Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions
Mobile: React Native, Flutter, Android, iOS
AI/ML: TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras, OpenCV, NLTK
Blockchain: Solidity, Ethereum, Hyperledger
APIs & Protocols: GraphQL, REST API, WebSocket, WebRTC
Other: Electron, WebAssembly, Quantum Computing (R&D), AR/VR, 5G Edge

## Leadership Team

- Gautam Gianchandi - CEO & Co-Founder (33+ years; international expansion, financial strategy, procurement; European telecom, IT, finance)
- Sunil Mudgal - CTO & Co-Founder (15+ years; technical architecture, product management, investment strategy)
- King Koduru - Education Director (28+ years; EdTech, community building, social impact; US-based)
- Arti Radhwani - Business Strategist (22+ years; stakeholder management, business consulting, client management)
- Vinit Arora - Business Development Director (15+ years; global expansion, strategic planning, executive relations)

## Partners

- PCU - Strategic Partner
- ITI (India Telecom) - Government Partner
- REIL (Rajasthan Electronics & Instruments Ltd) - Energy Partner
- Railtel - Telecom / Digital Transformation Partner
- CEL (Central Electronics Limited) - Technology Partner
- Braithwait & Co, Kolkata - Manufacturing Partner

## Key Clients

Indian Army, Defence Ministry of India, TRAI, Google, Singapore Embassy, OMCI Oil & Gas, Nepal Telecom, US Congress Library, Constitution Club of India, AFMS/DGAFMS, SM Group, SAR Group, GSMA
